{{Quote|A morp. The bite's poisonous. It causes paralysis, but it takes hours. I got a pretty big dose, though.|[[Raal Panteer]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="Empire 21">[[Empire 21|''Empire'' 21]]</ref>}}
[[File:KnobbySpiderMorp-woswfg.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A morp riding a [[Knobby white spider/Legends|knobby white spider]].]]
'''Morp''' was a carnivorous amphibian species native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].

Related to the [[nharpira]], these creatures would paralyze their prey with venomous bites, which could cause paralysis in a [[Human/Legends|Human]] in a matter of hours. They were known to rely on their small size and agility to avoid detection from larger predators such as [[Lesser Bogwing]]s. They were swamp-bound creatures, often found hiding in wormholes.

[[Heeth Panteer|Heeth]] and [[Raal Panteer]] imported at least one morp, along with hundreds of other creatures, to their [[Panteer estate|estate]] in the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]]. Raal was bitten by a morp while showing [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] around the wildlife preserve, and ultimately died from its venom.

The [[morp droid]]s used by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] were named after these creatures.
